achievements.title: We're At Code Red!
achievements.description: Clear 'That Old Army Game' on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Red Alert! Andy Is Coming Upstairs!
achievements.description: Clear 'Red Alert' on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: That Wasn't Flying, That Was Falling With Style!
achievements.description: Clear 'Ego Check' on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: You Don't Want To Be In Front Of My Laser When It Goes Off
achievements.description: Defeat Nightmare Buzz on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Toy Murderer
achievements.description: Clear 'Buzz Clip' on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Let's Hang Him By His Pullstring!
achievements.description: Clear 'Revenge of the Toys' on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: I Don't Like Confrontations
achievements.description: Clear 'Run Rex, Run!' on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Revenge Is Not An Idea We Promote On Our Planet
achievements.description: Defeat Buzz at the gas station on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: You Are Clear To Enter. Welcome To Pizza Planet!
achievements.description: Clear 'Food and Drink' on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: The Claw Is Our Master
achievements.description: Clear 'Inside the Claw Machine' on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: The Claw Chooses Who Will Go And Who Will Stay
achievements.description: Clear 'Really Inside the Claw Machine' on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: A Buzz Lightyear, Alright!
achievements.description: Make Sid waste all his quarters on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Where Are Your Rebel Friends NOW?
achievements.description: Clear 'Sid's Workbench' on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Use Your Karate Chop Action!
achievements.description: Clear 'Battle of the Mutant Toys' on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: A Daring Escape
achievements.description: Escape Sid's house while riding Roller Bob on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Got To Catch Up
achievements.description: Clear 'Light My Fire' on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: You Got A Friend In Me
achievements.description: Safely land into Andy's mom's car on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Efficient Toy
achievements.description: Hide all toys with at least 100 seconds left on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: iPhone Battery Life
achievements.description: Keep R.C. Car's battery charge above red in 'Buzz Clip' for the entire time.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: A Stranger. From The Outside. Oooooooh!
achievements.description: Find all the aliens with 25 seconds left on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: I've Seen The Movie
achievements.description: Turn off 'Storyline' in the option menu.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Star Collector
achievements.description: Collect all 50 stars in any level.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: You're My Favorite Deputy!
achievements.description: Earn a total of 500 stars or more throughout the playthrough.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Might Need This Later
achievements.description: Earn your first continue.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Look, I'm Woody! Howdy! Howdy! Howdy!
achievements.description: Earn 10 lives in a playthrough on Sheriff difficulty or higher.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Conquered Nightmare Buzz
achievements.description: Defeat Nightmare Buzz with full health.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Re'Tire' Buzz
achievements.description: Defeat Buzz at the gas station with full health on Sheriff difficulty or higher
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Reach For The Skies!
achievements.description: Beat the first four levels on the highest difficulty.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: This Town Ain't Big Enough For The Two Of Us!
achievements.description: Beat levels 5 through 8 on the highest difficulty.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: Somebody's Poisoned The Waterhole!
achievements.description: Beat levels 9 through 12 on the highest difficulty.
achievements.author: msdmario

achievements.title: There's A Snake In My Boots!
achievements.description: Finish the game on the highest difficulty.
achievements.author: msdmario
